title: LLM Pricing Data Schema
description: Schema for LLM API pricing data (v7.0 — pricing-only, simplified field names)

ModelPricing.description: Pricing keyed by currency code (e.g. USD, CNY). No metadata — provider is inferred from model_id prefix by consumers.

CurrencyPricing.description: Pricing for a model in a specific currency. Each modality has its own namespace.

text.description: Text token pricing ($/1M tokens). Present for all standard language models.

audio.description: Audio token pricing ($/1M tokens). Present for TTS and voice I/O models.

image.description: Image pricing. input is $/1M tokens (image input tokens). output is $/image (flat per-image fee for generation models).

video.description: Video token pricing ($/1M tokens). Present for video generation and understanding models.

tiered.description: Tiered pricing (e.g. price differs by context length)

ModalityPricing.description: Pricing for a single modality (text, audio, or video). Both fields are $/1M tokens.

ImageModalityPricing.description: Pricing for image modality. All prices are per 1M tokens.

read_input.description: Price for reading from cache per 1M tokens

creation_input.description: Price for creating cache entry per 1M tokens

input.description: Batch API input price per 1M tokens

output.description: Batch API output price per 1M tokens

image_output.description: Batch API price per 1M image output tokens

tier_start.description: Inclusive start of token range for this tier

tier_end.description: Exclusive end of token range (omitted for the last/open-ended tier)

input.description: Input price per 1M tokens for this tier

output.description: Output price per 1M tokens for this tier
